name: Kassadin

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Void Stone
passive.description_source: Innate:  Kassadin is permanently  ghosted and takes reduced  magic damage.

effects.description: Innate: Kassadin is permanently ghosted and takes 10% reduced magic damage.

passive.description: Innate: Kassadin is permanently ghosted and takes 10% reduced magic damage.

basic_ability_1.name: Null Sphere
basic_ability_1.description_source: Active:  Kassadin fires an orb of void energy at the target enemy that deals magic damage and  disrupts their ongoing  channels.

effects.context_notes: Active: Kassadin fires an orb of void energy at the target enemy that deals magic damage and disrupts their ongoing channels.
He also gains a shield that absorbs magic damage for 1.5 seconds.

basic_ability_1.description: Active: Kassadin fires an orb of void energy at the target enemy that deals magic damage and disrupts their ongoing channels.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The shield is granted at the start of the cast time.

basic_ability_2.name: Nether Blade
basic_ability_2.description_source: Passive:  Kassadin's  basic attacks deal bonus magic damage.

effects.description: Passive: Kassadin's basic attacks deal 20 (+ 10% AP) bonus magic damage on-hit.

effects.context_notes: Active: Kassadin empowers his next basic attack on-hit within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal increased bonus magic damage, and restore mana, with the restoration amount quintupled against champions.

Active: Kassadin empowers his next basic attack on-hit within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal increased bonus magic damage, and restore mana, with the restoration amount quintupled against champions.

Active: Kassadin empowers his next basic attack on-hit within 5 seconds to have an uncancellable windup, gain 50 bonus range, deal increased bonus magic damage, and restore mana, with the restoration amount quintupled against champions.

effects.description: Nether Blade resets Kassadin's basic attack timer.

basic_ability_2.description: Passive: Kassadin's basic attacks deal 20 (+ 10% AP) bonus magic damage on-hit.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): The passive damage applies proc damage and the active damage applies spell damage.

basic_ability_3.name: Force Pulse
basic_ability_3.description_source: Passive: Ability casts reduce the cooldown of this ability.

effects.description: Passive: Each time Kassadin or a nearby champion casts an ability, Force Pulse's current cooldown is reduced by 0.75 seconds.

effects.context_notes: Active: Kassadin emits a pulse of void energy in a cone in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them for 1 second.
Active: Kassadin emits a pulse of void energy in a cone in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies hit and slows them for 1 second.

basic_ability_3.description: Passive: Each time Kassadin or a nearby champion casts an ability, Force Pulse's current cooldown is reduced by 0.75 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Untargetable champions do not reduce Force Pulse's cooldown upon ability activations.

ultimate.name: Riftwalk
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Kassadin  blinks toward the target location, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies upon arrival. He then gains a stack of Riftwalk, stacking up to a cap.

effects.context_notes: Active: Kassadin blinks toward the target location, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies upon arrival.
Riftwalk: For each stack, Riftwalk deals bonus magic damage at an increased mana cost.
Riftwalk: For each stack, Riftwalk deals bonus magic damage at an increased mana cost.
Riftwalk: For each stack, Riftwalk deals bonus magic damage at an increased mana cost.

ultimate.description: Active: Kassadin blinks toward the target location, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies upon arrival. He then gains a stack of Riftwalk for 15 seconds, refreshing on subsequent casts and stacking up to 4 times.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Flash can be used during the cast time, allowing Kassadin to blink further away.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata
manual verification of ability timing and execution semantics for context-note normalization

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
